quote: I came to VitalEdge after a knee injury that left me unable to run. Sarah's physio programme had me back on the trails in 8 weeks. Not just running — competing. Her expertise is next level.
name: Tom Richards

quote: James's 12-week strength programme added 40kg to my squat and 25kg to my bench. But more importantly, I've never felt more confident in the gym. Every session had a clear purpose and I could see progress every week.
name: Aisha Patel

quote: The Fat Loss Bootcamp was brutal but in the best way possible. Lost 12kg in 8 weeks and the nutrition guidance from David made all the difference. I actually learned how to eat properly for the first time.
name: Chris Martinez

quote: As someone who sits at a desk 10 hours a day, Elena's mobility sessions have been life-changing. My chronic back pain is gone, I can touch my toes for the first time in years, and my posture is genuinely better.
name: Sarah Kim

quote: Lisa guided me through my postpartum recovery with such care and expertise. She understood exactly where my body was at and never pushed too hard. By week 10 I felt like myself again — stronger, actually.
name: Emma Thompson

quote: Rachel's mental wellness sessions gave me tools I use every single day. I was burning out from work and training, and she helped me find the balance I'd been missing. My performance actually improved when I started prioritising my mental health.
name: Jake Williams

quote: I've been to dozens of massage therapists and Alex is hands-down the best. He found trigger points in my shoulders that nobody else had identified. After 3 sessions, the headaches I'd been getting for months just stopped.
name: Michael Chen

quote: David's nutrition coaching completely changed my relationship with food. I went from restrictive dieting to a flexible approach that actually works. Down 15kg, stronger in the gym, and I actually enjoy eating now.
name: Priya Sharma

quote: The Advanced Powerlifting programme took me from a 500kg total to 580kg in 16 weeks. James's attention to detail on technique and his competition-day strategy were worth every penny. Won my weight class at regionals.
name: Dan O'Brien

quote: Marcus's HIIT sessions are the hardest thing I've ever done — and I love every minute of them. The energy in the group classes is electric, and the results speak for themselves. Best shape of my life at 42.
name: Rebecca Foster
